entity.label: Miniamin
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A chief priest who returned from Babylon with Zerubbabel (Neh. 12:5), called Mijamin (10:7) and Miniamin (12:17).

nodes.label: Miniamin
nodes.description: A chief priest who returned from Babylon with Zerubbabel (Neh. 12:5), called Mijamin (10:7) and Miniamin (12:17).

verses.text: Of Abijah, Zichri; of Miniamin, of Moadiah, Piltai;
